title: Ffi
purpose: `ffi/ffi.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `ffi` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: ABI and foreign-function boundaries used when Vitte code must cross language or runtime edges.
use_cases: A system integration module can expose a narrow ABI-facing wrapper while the rest of the program stays pure.
A runtime boundary should say exactly when the library stops and the foreign surface begins.
